title: Short Autumn Outings: Trimley, Frensham & Kate and Jamie's Farm

main_route.excerpt: August 31st. We went to [?Trimley] for one night, William cooked a Pavlova.

geocode_hint.hint: Trimley St Mary or Trimley St Martin near Felixstowe, Suffolk

main_route.excerpt: Sept 7th We went to Jane + Harry's wedding anniv party, camped at Frensham + had lunch with [?Jeffreys]

unresolved.issue: Place name uncertain; likely Trimley St Mary or Trimley St Martin near Felixstowe, Suffolk, given the Suffolk coastal context of the preceding diary entries (Aldeburgh, Thorpeness, Seamark), but transcription is marked uncertain.
unresolved.excerpt: We went to [?Trimley] for one night

unresolved.issue: Location of Kate and Jamie's farm not identified; no place name given. A trip named 1989-malvern-picnic-kate-jamie-s-farm exists suggesting a possible Malvern/West Midlands area, but this is speculative.
unresolved.excerpt: Sept 22nd We went to Kate + Jamie's farm for one night, picked plums + swam.

boundary_flags: mixed_start: page A_0054_L begins mid-page; preceding text belongs to the Thorpeness/Seamark holiday, not this trip.
summary: Three brief domestic overnight outings in autumn 1991 compressed onto a single diary page: a one-night stay at [?Trimley] in Suffolk on 31 August, an overnight camp at Frensham in Surrey on 7 September for Jane and Harry's wedding anniversary party, and a one-night visit to Kate and Jamie's farm on 22 September. All trips started and ended at home in Birmingham; no crossings were involved.
extraction_notes: This record covers three separate short trips compressed onto a single half-page (A_0054_L, diary p.104). The page has mixed_start=true, meaning the early part of the page belongs to the preceding Thorpeness holiday entry. Trimley is marked uncertain in the transcription; the Suffolk coastal context strongly suggests Trimley near Felixstowe but confidence is reduced. Kate and Jamie's farm has no location given — a 1989 trip record hints at a Malvern/West Midlands area but this is not confirmed. '[?Jeffreys]' on the Frensham entry appears to be a family name, not a place, and has not been recorded as a stop. Laura the au pair is mentioned for the Sept 22nd outing but is not a regular family member. The Sept 22nd outing to Kate and Jamie's farm is listed in the main_route only as an unresolved location; it is structurally another home–overnight–home loop but the destination cannot be geocoded. Dates are day-precise as given in the diary (1991-08-31, 1991-09-07, 1991-09-22); year confirmed as 1991 from the trip bundle.
